items.title: How do I create my first project?
items.content: After signing up, click 'New Project' on your dashboard. Choose a template or start from scratch. Name your project and invite collaborators.

items.title: What are workspaces?
items.content: Workspaces are shared environments where your team collaborates. Each workspace has its own settings, members, and billing. You can belong to multiple workspaces.

items.title: How do I import existing data?
items.content: Use the import wizard in Settings > Import. We support CSV, JSON, and direct imports from Trello, Asana, and Notion. Large imports are processed in the background.

items.title: Is there a quick-start guide?
items.content: Yes! Visit docs.example.com/quickstart for a 5-minute walkthrough. We also offer live onboarding sessions every Tuesday at 2 PM EST.

items.title: Can I use keyboard shortcuts?
items.content: Press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K) to open the command palette. From there you can navigate, create, and manage resources without touching your mouse.

faq-sb-contact-text.content: Still have questions? Our support team responds within 2 hours.
